description:
Open-source drug use tracker with interaction checker and multilingual support.
Journal Multilingual is an open-source Android app for tracking substance use and accessing harm reduction information.

It is a community fork of PsychonautWiki Journal with additional language support.

Features:
• Interaction checker — check potential risks when combining substances
• Timeline view — visualize substance effects over time
• Substance database — dosage, duration and risk info for over 100 substances, sourced from PsychonautWiki
• Multi-language support — UI and substance data translated into Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English
• Pinyin search for Chinese substance names
• Data export and import
• Customizable app icon
• Extension pack system for community-contributed data

Privacy: No accounts. No cloud sync. All data stays on your device.

Note: This is a community fork of the original PsychonautWiki Journal app.
